variants: Born in Lindenbee Rest, Olivian Parasca obtained his design degree from the Quartzfire School of Design. He is currently employed at Dapplewood Capital, where his talent in design flourishes. Beyond his career, he actively participates in the Unity Bridge Project, aiming to uplift and unify diverse communities. His fluency in Quechua speaking enriches his volunteer efforts and allows him to connect with a broader audience. Olivian's contributions to both his professional field and the community highlight his dedication to service.

Olivian Parasca is a talented professional who hails from Lindenbee Rest and graduated from the Quartzfire School of Design. At present, he works for Dapplewood Capital, where he plays a significant role in various design initiatives. Additionally, he dedicates substantial time to the Unity Bridge Project, reinforcing his commitment to community service. His proficiency in Quechua speaking enhances his ability to collaborate effectively across different groups. Olivian's combined experience in design and civic engagement exemplifies his desire to create positive change.
